_comment: auto-analytics plugin settings. Copy to <project>/.claude/auto-analytics-settings.json (or ~/.claude/ for a global default) and edit. Re-read every session — no reinstall needed. A pre-set environment variable always wins over these.
_web_analytics_reminder_help: SessionStart nudge when a web project has no analytics inventory yet. Set false to silence.
_sa_key_path_help: Absolute path to the Google service-account JSON key (analytics.edit, granted Administrator at the GA account level). This is the ONE human prerequisite — Google blocks automation login. Empty = guided-manual fallback (you paste Measurement IDs). For a shared cross-project key, point this at your GLOBAL.env location or a file path; never commit the key.
_gcloud_path_help: Optional path to the gcloud CLI, used ONLY as a token-minting fallback when the google-auth Python library is not installed. Leave empty to use `gcloud` on PATH (or rely on google-auth).
